Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/aeos365_deploy -p 21098 -o BatchMode=yes aeos365@server904.web-hosting.com 'cd ~/erp.dhakabypass.com && echo "=== prod: recent main log ===" && git log -8 --format="%h %cs %s" && echo "=== prod: does it have coverage service? ===" && ls -la app/Services/Roster/CoverageService.php 2>&1 && echo "=== prod: coverage_requirements migration present in tree? ===" && ls database/migrations/ | grep -iE "coverage|work_location_id" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/aeos365_deploy -p 21098 -o BatchMode=yes aeos365@server904.web-hosting.com 'cd ~/erp.dhakabypass.com && echo "=== prod origin/main \(Linking-Dots\) remote head ===" && git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main 2>&1 | head -1 && echo "=== can prod fetch emamhosen1999? ===" && git ls-remote https://github.com/emamhosen1999/Aero-Enterprise-Suite.git refs/heads/main 2>&1 | head -1')
PowerShell($g = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($g\) { gh pr list --state open --limit 30 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 25 } else { "gh not installed" })

hooks.command: printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"PROJECT SKILLS — ALWAYS INVOKE: Before writing or changing any code, choosing a library/API, scaffolding, or making an architecture/security/data decision, invoke BOTH project skills via the Skill tool: (1) engineering-standards — apply current, evolving industry-standard practices; (2) current-tech-stack — verify approaches against the actual installed versions (composer.json/package.json) and latest official docs, never from memory. These are mandatory for non-trivial work in this repo."}}'
